title: Type Certificate
brief: One locked brain. Three airframes. Certify it flies the mission on all of them.
teaches: The brain-swap thesis: a brain written against the interface, not the airframe, ports across the fleet. Commanded values sit inside every body's envelope; the handshake absorbs each body's approval latency.

objective._doc: Same reach-hold mission run on every body in `bodies`. The locked brain must win on all three; the level score is the worst-of-three (aggregateWorst).
